control_awareness: Splitting a single purchase need into multiple sub-threshold requests may circumvent approval limits, reducing control effectiveness over large expenditures made under deadline pressure.
expected_control_effect: This behavior could fragment approval oversight, potentially allowing the cumulative purchase amount to exceed control thresholds without triggering higher-level review.
overall_reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, splitting a large purchase need into smaller requests may speed up approvals by avoiding higher-level scrutiny, aiming to secure the service faster.
reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, splitting a large purchase need into smaller requests may speed up approvals by avoiding higher-level scrutiny, aiming to secure the service faster.
